issue_title: fixed the bug, removed 'required:false' it was causing additional prroperty error.
issue_body_preview: there was a hard-coded required field in method.js which was causing additional property error.
test_description_zh: 在 OpenAPI GUI 中创建或编辑一个 API 方法（如 GET/POST 等），填写相关字段后保存或验证该方法定义，观察是否出现额外属性错误（additional property error）提示。
expected_result_zh: 方法定义保存或验证时不应出现关于 'required' 字段的额外属性错误（additional property error），方法应能正常保存并在界面中正确显示，无错误提示。
